Manages boot bits, handles software failures, reads firmware from flash, and performs system resets.


## Files
- **[bootbits.c](bootbits.c.md)**: Manages boot bits and bootloader version using RTC backup registers.
- **[bootbits.h](bootbits.h.md)**: Defines boot bit values and functions for managing boot state in the Pebble firmware.
- **[die.c](die.c.md)**: Handles software failure by logging a message and triggering a system reset.
- **[die.h](die.h.md)**: Declares a function to handle software failure resets without setting a reboot reason.
- **[firmware_storage.c](firmware_storage.c.md)**: Functions for reading and validating firmware descriptions from flash memory.
- **[firmware_storage.h](firmware_storage.h.md)**: Utilities for reading and validating firmware images stored in flash memory.
- **[logging.h](logging.h.md)**: Defines logging macros for different log levels and conditions in the Pebble firmware.
- **[passert.c](passert.c.md)**: Handles assertion failures by printing debug information and triggering a software reset.
- **[passert.h](passert.h.md)**: Assertion macros and functions for error handling and debugging in the Pebble firmware.
- **[reset.c](reset.c.md)**: Functions for performing a system reset and a hard reset on an STM32F7 microcontroller.
- **[reset.h](reset.h.md)**: Functions for performing system reset and hard reset in the Pebble firmware.
- **[rtc_registers.h](rtc_registers.h.md)**: Defines RTC backup register mappings for boot and reboot information.
